name: Brainrot Click to Hatch - italan Brainrot
short_name: Brainrot Click to Hatch - italan Brainrot
description: Italan Brainrot Click to Hatch is the funniest meme clicker game! Tap to collect points, hatch cute pixel brainrot creatures, and unlock the most absurd evolutions. Every click gets you closer to building your viral meme collection. Simple, addictive, and full of brainrot energy!
